title: Anima Fractured
description: Fractured lets players trigger earthquakes using simple commands. Made for Anima SMP
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e29e1e3114c923dbf008b95d6d52288233e932.png)

# Fractured
**Fractured is a simple mod that allows you to create screen shake with earthquake sound using a simple commands.**

## Command preview:
!!!This command requires OP rights!!!

![command preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb9efff73c45f391f77897bebcdf19102d818971.png)

```
/earthquake [duration] [intensity] [player]

You are allowed to leave [player] empty, in this case earthquake will be shown to everyone.
Sound effect has duration of 13.5 seconds, so the best value for earthquake duration is 270 ticks (13.5 sec) 
```
